title: The public sours on AI and data centers as Anthropic, OpenAI look to IPO and tech keeps spending
summary: Public sentiment is turning negative on AI and data centers as companies like Anthropic and OpenAI prepare for IPOs, potentially impacting their valuations. This negativity could become a significant issue in midterm elections as tech companies continue massive infrastructure spending.
content: Negativity around AI could be a drag on OpenAI and Anthropic as the startups look to go public, and will likely be a major issue in the midterm elections.

zh.title: 随着Anthropic、OpenAI寻求IPO，公众对AI和数据中心失去热情，科技继续支出
zh.summary: 随着Anthropic和OpenAI等公司准备上市，公众对AI和数据中心的情感转向负面，可能影响其估值。这种负面情绪可能在中期选举中成为重大问题，因为科技公司继续进行大规模基础设施投资。

title: Major fire at Australian oil refinery to impact nation's petrol supplies
summary: A major fire at an Australian oil refinery threatens to worsen the nation's fuel supply situation amid a global energy crunch. The incident raises immediate concerns about petrol availability and prices for Australian consumers.
content: The fire has deepened fears over the nation's petrol supplies amid a global crunch.

zh.title: 澳大利亚炼油厂大火将影响全国汽油供应
zh.summary: 澳大利亚一家炼油厂的大火威胁在全球能源短缺中加剧该国的燃料供应状况。这起事件引发了澳大利亚消费者对汽油可用性和价格的直接担忧。

title: I gave my friend’s daughter cash for her wedding. I did not receive a thank-you card. Do I say something?
summary: An etiquette question arises when a wedding guest who gave cash fails to receive a thank-you note, despite the couple cashing the check within 10 days. The situation raises questions about proper acknowledgment of monetary gifts.
content: “They cashed the check 10 days after the wedding.”

zh.title: 我给朋友的女儿婚礼送了现金。我没有收到感谢卡。我应该说点什么吗？
zh.summary: 当给现金的婚礼宾客没有收到感谢信时，礼仪问题就出现了，尽管新婚夫妇在10天内兑现了支票。这种情况引发了关于适当承认货币礼物的问题。

title: How the Globalstar purchase could turn Amazon’s Leo into a satellite powerhouse
summary: Amazon's acquisition of Globalstar represents a strategic commitment to expanding its Leo satellite internet service into a major space infrastructure player. Though modest relative to Amazon's size, the deal demonstrates serious investment in satellite connectivity technology.
content: The Globalstar deal may seem trivial relative to Amazon’s size, but it represents an “important signal” that Amazon is committed to space.

zh.title: Globalstar收购如何将亚马逊的Leo转变为卫星强国
zh.summary: 亚马逊对Globalstar的收购代表了将其Leo卫星互联网服务扩展为主要太空基础设施玩家的战略承诺。虽然与亚马逊的规模相比相对较小，但这笔交易表明了对卫星连接技术的认真投资。

title: Back to books - Sweden's schools give up digital learning
summary: Swedish schools are replacing laptops with traditional books, pens, and paper in classrooms, a shift that concerns the technology sector. The move reflects growing concerns about screen time and digital learning effectiveness among educators.
content: Swedish classrooms swap laptops for books, pens and paper, raising concerns from the tech sector.

zh.title: 回到书籍——瑞典学校放弃数字学习
zh.summary: 瑞典学校正在教室中用传统书籍、笔和纸替换笔记本电脑，这一转变令科技部门担忧。这一举措反映了教育工作者对屏幕时间和数字学习有效性日益增长的关注。

title: Horse urine perfume: why online bargains may be dangerous
summary: Experts warn that online bargain products, including dangerous counterfeits like fake perfumes containing horse urine, pose hidden health and safety risks to consumers. The government is consulting on implementing stricter product safety regulations for e-commerce items.
content: Experts warn of hidden risk of counterfeits, while the government consults on stricter product safety rules.

zh.title: 马尿香水：为什么在线便宜货可能很危险
zh.summary: 专家警告说，在线便宜商品（包括危险的假冒品，如含有马尿的假香水）对消费者构成隐藏的健康和安全风险。政府正在就为电子商务商品实施更严格的产品安全法规进行咨询。

title: I’m selling my law practice and retiring. Do I pay off the $2 million loan on my office building — or keep the mortgage?
summary: A retiring lawyer faces a financial decision on whether to pay off a $2 million office building mortgage or maintain the loan after selling their practice. The choice involves balancing equity investment against cash flow and spousal financial preferences.
content: “My wife is not a fan of tying up $2 million of equity in one building.”

zh.title: 我要出售律师事务所并退休。应该偿还办公楼上的200万美元贷款，还是保留抵押贷款？
zh.summary: 一位即将退休的律师面临一个财务决择：是偿还办公楼上的200万美元抵押贷款，还是在出售事务所后继续保留贷款。这个选择涉及权衡股权投资、现金流和配偶的财务偏好。

title: Ticketmaster-owner Live Nation ran a monopoly and overcharged fans, jury finds
summary: A jury found that Ticketmaster owner Live Nation operated as an illegal monopoly and systematically overcharged customers for concert and event tickets. The ruling could lead to significant changes in ticketing practices, pricing structures, and industry competition.
content: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.

zh.title: 陪审团裁定Ticketmaster所有者Live Nation实施垄断并向粉丝过度收费
zh.summary: 陪审团裁定Ticketmaster所有者Live Nation构成非法垄断，并对音乐会和演出门票购票者进行了系统性的过度收费。这一裁决可能导致票务实践、定价结构和行业竞争方式出现重大改变。

title: Epstein accusations fly in Senate after César Chávez Monument row
summary: During a Senate debate over a César Chávez Monument, lawmakers raised Epstein-related accusations and proposed amending the bill to close the monument and examine creating a farm labor movement memorial. The dispute reflects broader tensions over how to memorialize historical figures.
content: Sen. Heinrich proposed amending a bill to temporarily close the monument and require the government to examine a new monument to honor the farm labor movement.

zh.title: César Chávez纪念碑争议后参议院出现Epstein指控
zh.summary: 在参议院就César Chávez纪念碑进行的辩论中，议员们提出了与Epstein相关的指控，并建议修改议案以关闭该纪念碑并探索建立农场劳工运动纪念碑的可能性。这场争议反映了如何纪念历史人物的更广泛的紧张局势。

title: Struggling shoe retailer Allbirds makes bizarre pivot to AI, adds $127 million in value
summary: Struggling shoe retailer Allbirds announced a deal to sell its intellectual property and assets to American Exchange Group for $39 million, an AI-focused pivot that added $127 million to its stock value. The move represents a dramatic strategic transformation for the company.
content: Allbirds announced a deal with American Exchange Group to sell its intellectual property and other assets for $39 million in March.

zh.title: 困顿鞋类零售商Allbirds奇特转向AI，股票价值增长1.27亿美元
zh.summary: 困顿的鞋类零售商Allbirds宣布与美国交易集团达成协议，以3900万美元出售其知识产权和资产，这一以AI为重点的转向使其股票价值增加了1.27亿美元。此举代表了该公司的剧烈战略转变。

title: More big energy users to get help as support plan expanded
summary: A government scheme to reduce electricity bills for energy-intensive businesses is being expanded to support an additional 3,000 companies facing rising power costs. The extension aims to help more major energy consumers manage the burden of elevated utility expenses.
content: A scheme to cut bills for firms that are heavy energy users is being extended to cover an additional 3,000 businesses.

zh.title: 随着支持计划扩展，更多大型能源用户将获得帮助
zh.summary: 政府计划正在扩展，以支持额外3000家面临电力成本上升的能源密集型企业。该扩展旨在帮助更多主要能源消费者应对不断上升的公用事业支出。

title: Spirit Airlines could liquidate as early as this week, sources say
summary: Spirit Airlines faces potential liquidation as early as this week, sources report, as the carrier struggles with surging fuel costs amid broader airline industry pressures. Fuel remains airlines' second-largest expense after labor, devastating carriers already operating on thin margins.
content: The carrier is facing the added challenge of a spike in the price of fuel. Fuel is airlines' biggest expense after labor.

zh.title: 知情人士称美国精神航空公司可能最早本周启动清算
zh.summary: 据知情人士报道，美国精神航空公司面临最早本周清算的可能，因为该航空公司在整个航空业压力下为飙升的燃油成本所困。燃料仍是航空公司仅次于劳动力的第二大支出，对已在微利边际运营的航空公司来说是灾难性的。

title: Iran war is a major source of uncertainty for U.S. businesses, Fed’s ‘beige book’ says
summary: The Federal Reserve's latest economic report indicates U.S. businesses are delaying major decisions due to uncertainty from the Iran war. This suggests broader economic caution spreading across the business community in response to geopolitical tensions.
content: U.S. businesses are pulling back from making major decisions due to uncertainty stemming from the war with Iran, according to the Federal Reserve’s latest report on regional economies, known as the “beige book.”

zh.title: 伊朗战争是美国企业不确定性的主要来源，美联储"米色书"称
zh.summary: 美联储最新经济报告表明，由于伊朗战争的不确定性，美国企业正在延迟重大决定。这表明在应对地缘政治紧张局势时，更广泛的经济谨慎态度正在商业社区蔓延。

title: World Bank president: Prepare for months of disruption, even after Hormuz Strait reopens
summary: The World Bank president warned that economic recovery will take several months even after the Strait of Hormuz reopens. The timeline indicates prolonged disruption to global trade and supply chains.
content: It will take "a few months for things to come back" once the Strait of Hormuz is no longer effectively closed, Banga said.

zh.title: 世界银行行长：为数月的混乱做好准备，即使在荷姆兹海峡重新开放后
zh.summary: 世界银行行长警告说，即使在荷姆兹海峡重新开放后，经济复苏也需要数月时间。这一时间表表明全球贸易和供应链将面临长期混乱。

title: Jeanine Pirro pursues Fed pressure while clock ticks on her appeal in Powell probe
summary: The U.S. attorney for Washington D.C. has not yet filed an expected appeal challenging a judge's ruling that dismissed subpoenas Jeanine Pirro issued to the Federal Reserve. The appeal deadline continues to approach as the legal matter remains unresolved.
content: The U.S. attorney for the District of Columbia has yet to file a planned appeal to a judge's ruling quashing her subpoenas to the Federal Reserve.

zh.title: 珍妮·皮罗在鲍威尔调查上诉中追求对美联储的压力，时限在倒计时
zh.summary: 华盛顿特区美国检察官尚未提交预期的上诉，该上诉将对法官裁决提出质疑，该裁决驳回了珍妮·皮罗向美联储发出的传票。随着该法律事项仍未解决，上诉截止日期不断临近。

title: Over 643,000 student loan borrowers are waiting on repayment plans or forgiveness, court filing shows
summary: More than 643,000 federal student loan borrowers remain in limbo awaiting Trump administration action on debt forgiveness or enrollment in repayment plans. The delays continue to affect borrowers uncertain about their loan obligations.
content: More than 643,000 federal student loan borrowers are waiting for the Trump administration to forgive their debt or enroll them in a repayment plan.

zh.title: 超过643,000名学生贷款借款人正在等待还款计划或债务减免，法庭文件显示
zh.summary: 超过643,000名联邦学生贷款借款人仍在等待特朗普政府关于债务减免或还款计划注册的行动。延迟继续影响对贷款义务不确定的借款人。

title: Who were the winners this tax season? People who took advantage of the bigger SALT deduction.
summary: The expanded State and Local Tax deduction has produced significant tax refunds, with homeowners in Democratic-leaning states seeing the largest benefits. The provision has provided substantial relief for high-tax-state residents.
content: The expanded deduction has led to hefty refunds, especially for homeowners in Democrat-leaning states.

zh.title: 今年税季的赢家是谁？利用更大SALT扣除额的人。
zh.summary: 扩大的州和地方税扣除产生了显著的税收退款，民主党倾向州的房主获得最大利益。该条款为高税州居民提供了实质性救济。

title: Here’s where to find the cheapest gas in America right now — up to 34 cents a gallon below the national average
summary: Gas prices vary by as much as 34 cents per gallon across regions, with some areas offering significant savings compared to the national average. Americans are increasingly seeking out cheaper gas locations and adjusting travel habits accordingly.
content: Americans are already biking to work, pooling trips and adjusting travel plans, MarketWatch has reported. Those who can are looking for cheaper gas prices in their area.

zh.title: 这是现在在美国找到最便宜汽油的地方——比全国平均价格低达34美分/加仑
zh.summary: 汽油价格在地区之间相差多达34美分/加仑，有些地区与全国平均价格相比提供显著节省。美国人越来越多地寻求更便宜的汽油地点并相应调整旅行习惯。

title: CoreWeave sees a $7 billion win from an unconventional customer. Financial firms want AI chips, too.
summary: CoreWeave announced a $7 billion partnership with financial services firms seeking artificial intelligence chip computing capacity. The deal highlights growing demand from the financial sector for AI infrastructure.
content: The arrangement shows that computing is increasingly relevant to the financial sector.

zh.title: CoreWeave从非传统客户获得70亿美元的胜利。金融公司也想要AI芯片。
zh.summary: CoreWeave宣布与寻求人工智能芯片计算能力的金融服务公司建立70亿美元的合作伙伴关系。该交易凸显了金融部门对AI基础设施日益增长的需求。

title: Most retirees want to age in their own homes — but they’re not factoring in these hidden costs
summary: While 77% of Americans over 50 express a desire to age in their own homes, significant hidden costs related to care and home modifications may make this goal economically impractical. The gap between preference and affordability presents a major challenge for older Americans.
content: As many as 77% of people age 50 and older want to age in place. It might not be worth it.

zh.title: 大多数退休人员想要在自己的家中养老——但他们没有考虑到这些隐藏成本
zh.summary: 虽然超过50岁的美国人中有77%表示希望在自己的家中养老，但与护理和家庭改造相关的重大隐藏成本可能会使这一目标在经济上不可行。偏好与可负担性之间的差距对老年美国人来说是一个重大挑战。

title: Two Wall Street analysts are getting bullish on a Target turnaround. Here's why
summary: Two Wall Street analysts upgraded their outlooks on Target as the retailer implements store revamps and continues benefiting from strong 2026 stock performance. The analyst support suggests confidence in Target's turnaround strategy.
content: Target shares are soaring in 2026, and that trend could get a boost as the retailer revamps its stores, analysts said.

zh.title: 两位华尔街分析师对Target的扭亏为盈变得乐观。原因如下
zh.summary: 两位华尔街分析师提高了对Target的展望，该零售商正在实施门店翻新，并继续从强劲的2026年股票表现中获益。分析师的支持表明对Target扭亏为盈战略的信心。

title: Tesla stock pops as Elon Musk touts chip progress
summary: Tesla's stock price rose after CEO Elon Musk highlighted progress on chip development and manufacturing. UBS analysts also upgraded the company from a bearish stance.
content: UBS analysts changed their previously bearish rating on shares of Tesla this week.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克宣扬芯片进展，特斯拉股价上涨
zh.summary: 首席执行官埃隆·马斯克强调了芯片开发和制造的进展后，特斯拉股价上升。瑞银分析师也将该公司从看跌立场升级。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: DoorDash, Robinhood, Broadcom, Sandisk & more
summary: Several major stocks posted substantial moves during midday trading, including DoorDash, Robinhood, Broadcom, and SanDisk. The trading activity reflects significant market movements across multiple sectors.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 午盘股票最大涨跌：DoorDash、Robinhood、Broadcom、SanDisk及更多
zh.summary: 几只主要股票在午盘交易中出现大幅波动，包括DoorDash、Robinhood、Broadcom和SanDisk。交易活动反映了多个行业的重大市场变动。

title: Tim Cook is back to buying Nike stock, four months after an ill-timed purchase
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook purchased $1 million worth of Nike stock as the company's shares hit a 12-year low. The purchase comes four months after Cook made a previous Nike investment at an inopportune time.
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook, a longtime Nike board member, spent $1 million of his own money to buy Nike’s stock as it dipped to a 12-year low.

zh.title: 蒂姆·库克重新购买耐克股票，距上次时机不当的购买仅四个月
zh.summary: 苹果首席执行官蒂姆·库克购买了100万美元的耐克股票，因为该公司股票跌至12年低点。这次购买距离库克之前在不合时宜的时机进行的耐克投资仅四个月。

title: Anthropic products are operational after brief outage, status page says
summary: Anthropic experienced a brief outage affecting its Claude chatbot, Claude Code platform, and API services. The company reported that all products have returned to operational status.
content: Anthropic said it is working to "fully resolve this issue," according to its page showing the status of the Claude chatbot, Claude Code and the API.

zh.title: Anthropic产品在短暂故障后恢复运营，状态页面显示
zh.summary: Anthropic经历了短暂的故障，影响了其Claude聊天机器人、Claude Code平台和API服务。该公司报告称所有产品已恢复正常运营状态。

title: White House budget chief Russell Vought won't estimate Iran war cost in testimony
summary: During congressional testimony, Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought declined to provide a cost estimate for the ongoing Iran war. His reluctance to estimate costs raises questions about budget transparency.
content: Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought testified before the House Budget Committee on Wednesday.

zh.title: 白宫预算官员罗素·沃特在证词中拒绝估算伊朗战争成本
zh.summary: 在国会听证会上，管理和预算办公室主任罗素·沃特拒绝提供持续伊朗战争的成本估计。他拒绝估算成本引起了对预算透明度的质疑。

title: Iran team is 'coming for sure' to 2026 World Cup in U.S., says FIFA President Infantino
summary: FIFA President Gianni Infantino confirmed that Iran will participate in the 2026 World Cup in the United States despite the ongoing war with America. The confirmation suggests the tournament will proceed with Iran's participation despite geopolitical tensions.
content: Amid war with the U.S., Iran's participation in the World Cup is uncertain. But FIFA President Gianni Infantino tells CNBC they will play in North America.

zh.title: 伊朗队"肯定会来"参加2026年美国世界杯，FIFA主席因凡蒂诺表示
zh.summary: 尽管与美国的战争仍在进行，FIFA主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺确认伊朗将参加2026年在美国举办的世界杯。这一确认表明尽管存在地缘政治紧张局势，该赛事将在伊朗参与的情况下进行。

title: Snap's stock jumps 9% on plans to axe 16% of its workforce citing AI efficiencies
summary: Snap announced plans to lay off 16% of its global workforce citing AI-driven efficiencies, boosting the company's stock 9% in premarket trading. The move underscores how tech companies are leveraging artificial intelligence to reduce headcount while maintaining operations.
content: Snap was up in premarket trading on Wednesday after announcing plans to lay off up to 16% of its global workforce citing AI-driven efficiencies

zh.title: Snap股价上涨9% 计划以AI效率为由裁减16%员工
zh.summary: Snap宣布计划以AI驱动的效率提升为由裁减全球员工的16%，推动该公司股票在盘前交易中上涨9%。此举突显了科技公司如何利用人工智能在保持运营的同时减少人员。

title: Morgan Stanley beats Wall Street earnings forecasts — by a long way
summary: Morgan Stanley surpassed Wall Street earnings expectations with EPS of $3.43, significantly beating the consensus forecast of $3.02. The banking giant's strong quarter demonstrates sustained strength in the financial sector.
content: The banking giant posted earnings per share of $3.43, compared to forecasts of $3.02.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利盈利大幅超越华尔街预期
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利每股收益达3.43美元，远超华尔街共识预期的3.02美元。这家银行巨头的强劲季度表现证明了金融部门持续的强势。

title: April 15 is tax deadline day — and here’s why it’s also important for the stock market
summary: April 15 marks the tax filing deadline, and researchers warn investors are about to lose a financial cushion that has supported stock market gains for months. The timing could have significant implications for near-term market dynamics.
content: Investors are about to lose a financial cushion that’s been supporting the stock market for months, warns Strategas researchers.

zh.title: 4月15日是税务申报截止日——及其对股市的重要意义
zh.summary: 4月15日是税务申报截止日期，研究人员警告投资者将失去一个在过去数月支撑股市涨幅的财务缓冲。这个时机可能对近期市场动态产生重大影响。

title: Trump accounts sign up 5 million kids, with 1.2 million eligible for $1,000 seed money, Bessent says
summary: Trump accounts have registered 5 million children, with 1.2 million eligible to receive $1,000 in seed money, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. The program aims to provide financial benefits to eligible families.
content: Trump accounts have signed up 5 million kids, according to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Here's what families need to know.

zh.title: 特朗普账户注册500万名儿童，120万人有资格获得1000美元种子资金，贝塞特表示
zh.summary: 根据财政部长斯科特·贝塞特称，特朗普账户已注册500万名儿童，其中120万人有资格获得1000美元种子资金。该计划旨在向符合条件的家庭提供经济福利。

title: Why BLTs and salad just got more expensive — tariffs, war send tomato prices soaring
summary: Tomato prices have surged in recent months, driven primarily by trade policy and geopolitical tensions. The sharp increases are making common food items like BLTs and salads noticeably more expensive for consumers.
content: Tomato prices have risen sharply in recent months, driven largely by trade policy, economists said.

zh.title: 为什么BLT和沙拉变贵了——关税和战争导致番茄价格飙升
zh.summary: 近几个月番茄价格飙升，主要由贸易政策和地缘政治紧张局势推动。价格大幅上涨使BLT和沙拉等常见食物对消费者来说明显更贵了。

title: Big Tech’s giant headache: billions in AI capital spending means investors demand results
summary: Major tech companies are investing billions in AI, creating intense investor expectations for measurable returns on that spending. The massive capital deployment carries significant implementation risks tied to AI's transformative but uncertain potential.
content: Implementing AI carries plenty of risks — most of which stem from its tremendous potential.

zh.title: 大科技公司的大麻烦：数十亿美元的AI资本支出意味着投资者要求回报
zh.summary: 大型科技公司正在向AI投入数十亿美元，这为该支出的可衡量回报创造了激烈的投资者期望。这种大规模资本部署带来了与AI变革性但不确定潜力相关的重大实施风险。

title: Power Insider: The markets are obsessed with the Strait of Hormuz. Why it matters less than you think
summary: Retail and professional traders closely monitor traffic in the Strait of Hormuz seeking to predict oil price movements. However, analysts argue this focus substantially overstates the strait's actual influence on global oil markets.
content: Retail and pro traders are obsessed with gauging the traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, thinking they can gain an edge on where oil prices are going. They can’t.

zh.title: 权力内幕：市场痴迷于霍尔木兹海峡。为什么它的重要性没有你想的那么大
zh.summary: 零售和专业交易员密切监控霍尔木兹海峡的交通流量以预测油价变动。但分析人士辩称，这种关注大大高估了该海峡对全球石油市场的实际影响。

title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
summary: Bank of America exceeded earnings expectations for the 23rd consecutive quarter, with CEO Brian Moynihan characterizing consumer banking as healthy. The results from the second-largest U.S. bank by assets reinforce sector strength.
content: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.

zh.title: 美国银行超过预期，CEO布莱恩·莫伊尼汉称消费者银行业务"健康"
zh.summary: 美国银行连续第23个季度超过收益预期，CEO布莱恩·莫伊尼汉将消费者银行业务描述为健康状态。这家美国资产第二大银行的财报结果强化了该行业的强势。

title: Walmart is refreshing the look of Great Value, its largest private label brand
summary: Walmart is redesigning Great Value, its largest private label brand, with a more modern and colorful appearance. The refresh reflects broader retail investment in private label as competition in the discount segment intensifies.
content: The nation's largest grocer is giving the brand a more modern and colorful spin as other retailers invest in private label.

zh.title: 沃尔玛正在刷新其最大自有品牌Great Value的形象
zh.summary: 沃尔玛正在重新设计其最大的自有品牌Great Value，采用更现代和丰富多彩的外观。这次刷新反映了零售业在自有品牌上的更广泛投资，因为折扣市场竞争日益激烈。

title: Starbucks launches beta app in ChatGPT to fuel new drink discovery
summary: Starbucks launched a beta app integrated with ChatGPT to help customers discover new beverages. The initiative aims to drive traffic back to Starbucks cafes amid broader efforts to boost U.S. customer engagement.
content: Starbucks is trying to find ways to entice U.S. customers back to its cafes.

zh.title: 星巴克在ChatGPT推出测试版应用促进新饮品发现
zh.summary: 星巴克推出了与ChatGPT整合的测试版应用，帮助顾客发现新饮品。该举措旨在吸引顾客回到星巴克门店，是提升美国顾客参与度的更广泛努力的一部分。

title: Top Energy Democrat probes Trump administration's preparations for Strait of Hormuz closure
summary: A leading Democratic energy official is investigating the Trump administration's preparedness for a potential Strait of Hormuz closure. The strait has been effectively closed since U.S. military operations against Iran began, causing energy price spikes and significant market volatility.
content: The strait has been effectively closed since the U.S. launched a war with Iran, spiking energy prices and whipsawing markets.

zh.title: 民主党高级能源官员调查特朗普政府对霍尔木兹海峡关闭的准备
zh.summary: 一位民主党高级能源官员正在调查特朗普政府对潜在霍尔木兹海峡关闭的准备。自美国对伊朗的军事行动开始以来，该海峡已实际关闭，导致能源价格飙升和显著的市场波动。

title: Major stock-market indexes approach ‘overbought’ territory after swift rally
summary: Major stock indexes are approaching overbought conditions following a swift market rally. Historical momentum indicators suggest indices could experience notable pullbacks in the coming weeks.
content: Last time momentum measures were this high indices saw notable pullbacks in the next few weeks

zh.title: 主要股市指数在迅速上涨后接近超买区域
zh.summary: 主要股市指数在迅速上升后接近超买状况。历史动量指标表明这些指数在未来几周内可能经历显著回调。

title: These stocks and ETFs can beat the ‘sell in May’ slump — and dodge the 2026 midterm blues
summary: Market strategists recommend targeted stock and ETF selections to navigate the traditional summer slowdown and 2026 midterm election volatility. Investors can maintain market participation without fully exiting positions through careful security selection.
content: You don’t have to exit the market to survive a summer lull. Here’s your ‘stay and play’ strategy for the 2026 election cycle.

zh.title: 这些股票和ETF可以战胜"五月卖出"低迷——并规避2026年中期选举困境
zh.summary: 市场策略师建议有针对性地选择股票和ETF，以应对传统的夏季低迷和2026年中期选举波动。投资者可以通过谨慎的证券选择，在不完全退出头寸的情况下保持市场参与度。

title: Bank of America’s 30% jump in equities revenue helps power an earnings beat
summary: Bank of America's equities revenue jumped 30%, contributing significantly to its earnings beat. The strong quarter was bolstered by elevated market volatility and an increasingly favorable regulatory environment.
content: Bank of America’s good quarter was helped by volatility and an easier regulatory environment.

zh.title: 美洲银行股票收入增长30%助力盈利超预期
zh.summary: 美洲银行的股票收入增长了30%，对其盈利超预期做出了重大贡献。该强劲季度得到了市场波动加剧和监管环境日益有利的支撑。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Bank of America, Morgan Stanley, Robinhood & more
summary: Bank of America, Morgan Stanley, Robinhood, and other major stocks posted significant premarket movements. The moves reflect investor reactions to earnings announcements and broader market sentiment.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前交易中涨跌最大的股票：美洲银行、摩根士丹利、Robinhood等
zh.summary: 美洲银行、摩根士丹利、Robinhood和其他大型股票在盘前交易中出现重大波动。这些波动反映了投资者对收益公告和更广泛市场情绪的反应。

title: Chip giant ASML raises 2026 guidance as AI semiconductor demand stays strong
summary: ASML beat Q1 revenue and profit expectations and raised its 2026 sales guidance. The chip maker's outperformance reflects sustained strong demand for AI semiconductor manufacturing equipment.
content: ASML beat first-quarter revenue and profit expectations and raised its sales guidance for 2026.

zh.title: 芯片巨头ASML提高2026年指导预期，AI芯片制造设备需求保持强劲
zh.summary: ASML超越了第一季度的收入和利润预期，并提高了2026年的销售指导。这家芯片制造商的超预期表现反映了对AI芯片制造设备持续强劲的需求。

title: AA fined and ordered to refund learner drivers for hidden fees
summary: The AA and BSM driving schools were fined and ordered to refund customers after failing to disclose booking fees upfront during online transactions. The penalty addresses hidden charges that violated consumer protection standards.
content: The owner of the AA and BSM driving schools failed to disclose fees upfront during online booking.

zh.title: AA被罚款并被命令向学员驾驶员退款，因隐性费用问题
zh.summary: AA和BSM驾驶学校因在线交易中未预先披露预订费用而被罚款并被命令向客户退款。该罚款针对违反消费者保护标准的隐性收费。

title: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'
summary: Trump renewed criticism of Pope Leo amid ongoing tensions between the White House and Vatican over U.S.-Israel military operations against Iran. The diplomatic spat reflects broader disagreements on regional security strategy.
content: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普再次针对教宗利奥，在称其在打击犯罪方面软弱数天后
zh.summary: 特朗普针对教宗利奥重新批评，此时白宫与梵蒂冈之间在美国-以色列对伊朗的军事行动问题上持续紧张。这一外交争执反映了对地区安全战略的更广泛分歧。

title: European markets eye mixed open as traders assess Iran war latest
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed sentiment as traders evaluate the latest developments in the U.S.-Iran conflict. Market reaction hinges on assessing potential escalation or de-escalation of Middle East tensions.
content: European stocks are expected to open in mixed territory on Wednesday as regional traders assess the trajectory of the U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 欧洲市场关注伊朗战争最新进展，交易员评估开盘走势
zh.summary: 欧洲股市预计将以混合情绪开盘，交易员评估美伊冲突最新发展。市场反应取决于对中东紧张局势可能升级或缓解的评估。

title: Samsung SDS shares jump 20% on KKR partnership and $820 million bond purchase
summary: Samsung SDS shares surged 20% after KKR agreed to purchase $820 million in newly issued convertible bonds. The deal establishes a strategic partnership that could unlock value through alternative asset strategies.
content: KKR & Co has agreed to acquire $820 million of newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, in a deal that creates a new strategic partnership.

zh.title: 三星SDS股价因KKR合作和8.2亿美元债券购买上涨20%
zh.summary: 在KKR同意购买8.2亿美元新发行可转债后，三星SDS股价上涨20%。该交易建立了一个战略合作伙伴关系，可能通过替代资产策略释放价值。

title: Crisis grants launched for struggling families
summary: Bradford residents affected by unexpected job losses or illness can now apply for emergency financial assistance through newly launched crisis grants. The program provides immediate relief for families facing sudden hardship.
content: Bradford residents affected by unexpected job losses or illness will be able to apply for help.

zh.title: 为困难家庭推出危机补助金
zh.summary: 布拉德福德居民如果遭遇意外失业或疾病，现在可以申请通过新推出的危机补助金获得紧急财务援助。该计划为面临突然困难的家庭提供即时救济。

title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
summary: The U.S. has completed implementation of its Strait of Hormuz blockade on Iran while simultaneously signaling openness to diplomatic negotiations. This dual approach aims to maximize pressure while preserving paths toward conflict resolution.
content: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

zh.title: 美国称荷尔木兹海峡封锁"已全面实施"，同时向伊朗发出外交缓和信号
zh.summary: 美国已完成对伊朗的荷尔木兹海峡封锁，同时表示愿意进行外交谈判。这种双管齐下的方式旨在最大化施压，同时保留冲突解决的途径。

title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
summary: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks escalating economic pressure on China and India as critical energy markets face disruptions. The spillover tensions highlight how U.S.-Iran conflicts impact America's relationships with major Asian powers.
content: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.

zh.title: 特朗普的荷尔木兹封锁将中国、印度置于十字火力之下，美国对伊朗压力蔓延
zh.summary: 美国对荷尔木兹海峡的封锁可能加剧对中国和印度的经济压力，因为关键能源市场面临中断。这种溅射效应凸显美伊冲突如何影响美国与亚洲大国的关系。

title: U.S. crude trades lower as possible Washington-Tehran talks raise hopes for Mideast peace deal
summary: U.S. crude oil prices declined as optimism grew about potential negotiations between Washington, Tehran, and Israel to resolve Middle East tensions. Hopes of restarting talks eased concerns about prolonged Strait of Hormuz disruption.
content: Oil prices traded mixed as optimism grew that Iran may restart negotiations with the U.S. and Israel, easing tensions over the conflict that has disrupted the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美国原油交易下跌，华盛顿-德黑兰会谈可能性提高了中东和平协议的希望
zh.summary: 随着美伊和以色列进行潜在谈判以解决中东紧张局势的乐观情绪增长，美国原油价格下跌。重启会谈的希望缓解了对荷尔木兹海峡长期中断的担忧。

title: Asia markets open higher as hopes for a U.S.-Iran deal rise and oil prices drop
summary: Asia-Pacific markets gained following overnight U.S. stock gains driven by lower oil prices and optimism around a potential U.S.-Iran deal. The decline in crude reflects easing geopolitical tensions and improved risk sentiment.
content: Asia-Pacific markets track overnight gains in U.S. stocks on lower oil prices amid hopes of a Iran-U.S. deal

zh.title: 随着美伊协议希望增加和油价下跌，亚洲市场高开
zh.summary: 亚太市场在美国股市隔夜上涨的推动下上升，油价下跌和围绕潜在美伊协议的乐观情绪是主要原因。原油价格下跌反映了地缘政治紧张局势的缓解和风险情绪的改善。

title: A new CEO and a deal with Uber aren’t enough to lift this EV maker’s struggling stock
summary: Lucid Motors announced new leadership and a deal with Uber, but investors remain skeptical about the company's financial viability and survival prospects. The move highlights ongoing concerns about the EV maker's path to profitability.
content: The announcement comes amid concerns from investors about Lucid’s ability to stay afloat.

zh.title: 新首席执行官和与优步的交易不足以提振这家电动汽车制造商的低迷股价
zh.summary: 路西德汽车宣布了新的领导层和与优步的交易，但投资者仍对该公司的财务可行性和生存前景持怀疑态度。这一举措突出了人们对这家电动汽车制造商盈利之路的持续担忧。

title: Stock futures are little changed as S&P 500 approaches its all-time high: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday trading less than 1% below its January 28 all-time high, with stock futures showing minimal movement. The index continues to hover near record levels amid stable market conditions.
content: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.

zh.title: 随着标普500指数接近历史高点，股指期货变化不大：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500指数周二收盘时较1月28日历史高点下跌不足1%，股指期货涨幅有限。该指数在市场平稳的情况下继续在纪录水平附近徘徊。
